Document:
# Capital Crimes - These crimes are extreme severity. - All of these crimes may be punished by [bold]Permanent confinement and demotion, or execution and ID termination.[/bold]
Charge
Description
Jailbreak/Escape
\- To escape, assist in an escape, attempt escape, or be willfully and knowingly broken out from a cell.
Attempted Murder
\- Attempting to murder a person but failing to do so. Applies if the evidence shows that the arrested person was clearly trying to kill someone with ill intent but failed in the action itself.
Murder/Unauthorized Execution
\- Killing someone with malicious intent. This includes Synthetic units. The charge applies even if the victim is later revived. \n\- Refusing or preventing to revive anyone not executed through provided execution procedures.
Sedition
\- To engage in actions or refuse to follow orders, in a way intended to overthrow or usurp the legitimate command structure. \n\- Creating a code [bold][color=red]Red[/color][/bold] threat to the warship. \n\- Proclaiming allegiance to, or acting on behalf of, the supposed CLF is an act of sedition against the UN. \n\- In the event of a failed mutiny, the [color=#008000][bold]Commander[/bold][/color] may decide to deny treatment or revival of mutineers that have not surrendered, citing sedition by mutiny as the reason.
Desertion
\- Refusing to carry out the duties essential to one’s post or abandoning post unauthorized, without intent to return. (Retreating from the planet when the FOB is breached is not Desertion, refusing to return when ordered is).
Crimes against Interstellar Life
\- To engage in actions that violate the rights of interstellar life or otherwise are heinous acts against interstellar life. \n\- Torture, cannibalism and forced infection of any kind.
